Review Text:
A fair priced and solid option for pizza. Friendly staff and they have a variety of different Spanish dishes. Unfortunately, the pizza was only so/so but if you go when the large pie is 8.95 then it is definitely worth the price.

Dough: 4/5 fresh, light and tasted good
Sauce: 3/5 right amount but nothing special
Cheese: 4/5 right amount and evenly dispersed
Presentation: 3/5 just average nothing special
Texture: 1/5 very poorly prepared as the crust was nicely cooked but the bottom was not evenly cooked. Very doughy and undercooked.

Tl;Dr good value, nice staff, average pizza

Best Pizza in town! Crunchy crispy crust and great flavor. The white pizza and pepper and onion pizza are my favorites! Tuna subs always fresh and zeppolis need work but the service is excellent which made me forgive the horrible treats.

I ordered the Cuban Sandwich and beef empanadas , being Cuban born I was very happy with the Cuban sandwich , was actually not expecting it to be as GOOD ! as it was and so were the empanadas. We will definitely order from you guys again. Thank you! and stay yummy!  :  ) next time I will try the garlic shrimp with rice . Thanks again Gigi

When they started, they were excellent. There was a great variety of menu items including both Mexican and Italian. As time went on, however, the quality slowly went down to the point where sometimes burnt food would be served. My last order from here was a burrito which had burnt rice in it. Now it seems that it is closed.

No reason this place should even get 1 star.  I ordered tonight and the entire pizza had about a handful of cheese and a tsp of sauce. I called and they agreed to take original pie back in exchange for a new pie.  This is a pic of the new pie.  It looks like they added a few teaspoons of sauce lol. Will not be ordering again from this place unless of course I need some cardboard for storage 😜
Great haircuts from a Great guy. Nice friendly will not be disappointed
First time visit today. I'm very happy with the haircut. Greg is a very friendly person and did a great job. Will definitely be going back.

I went to this barber in a crunch.  I had seen it many times in passing, so looked at the reviews and gave it a shot.
WORST HAIRCUT IN MY LIFE would be the a very accurate statement.  I was shocked at what he did to me.  I asked for a faded side blended into the top, don't touch the top.  As he was doing my hair I asked him several times why do i have lines and does that look even to you. He kept saying yes it was even.  I was clearly telling him it wasn't and he just went and made it worst.  As I stood up and explained my discontent with his haircut his remark to me was "you have fine hair, i was afraid to cut into it".  I HAVE NEVER BEEN TOLD BY A BARBER THEY WERE AFRAID TO CUT INTO MY HAIR and I asked him "SO WHAT ARE YOU HERE FOR IF YOU'RE AFRAID TO GIVE 'HALF A HAIRCUT, BECAUSE ALL I NEEDED WAS THE SIDES AND BACK'?
I paid for the cut when i know i shouldn't have.
The other thing that put me over the edge was when he shaved the back of my neck, he used a blade that was so dull, it must not have been changed in weeks.  I HAVE A THING ABOUT SANITARY CONDITIONS AND THIS PLACE DID NOT CUT IT.
He also thought it was funny after I told him he messed up my hair.  He's lucky he's 80 years old, cause I wanted to deck him in his face for that smile on his face seeing that i was upset.  I was not there for his entertainment of the day!
WARNING:  IF YOU EVER GET A BARBER THAT SQUINTS, BECAUSE HE OBVIOUSLY NEEDS GLASSES ... WALK OUT.  DISCONTINUE IMMEDIATELY, AS I SHOULD HAVE.

Stopped in to have Greg cut my hair again. A small business man that does a great job cutting hair. Prices are very reasonable. Place is great and clean. If you’re in the South Amboy Sayville area stop visit Greg and help a small businessman out

If you are my age (40) or older, then you probably remember barbers performing their craft in a manner that does not automatically nor exclusively involve the use of an electric razor.  Today's haircut was literally the nicest I have experienced in about twenty years or so.  Very meticulous work.  Frankly, this is a real barber.

I hired E-Z Guys to remove bed bugs, and I couldn't be happier with the results. Billy was friendly, making the entire experience enjoyable and stress-free. The staff was also incredibly knowledgeable, explained the treatment procedure, and answered my questions. Their cost was very reasonable. Overall, I highly recommend E-Z Bed Bug Extermination to anyone!
Kind and patient! My elderly mom was nervous about chemicals. The team used gentle treatments and took time to reassure her. She’s raving about their kindness.

The treatment they provided did not work!!! Nightmare!!! I hired EZ Pest to treat bed bugs. After 3 treatments and no success, they insisted it was coming from my neighbors home. I arranged for them to inspect my neighbors home and they found evidence of bed bugs, which made them void my warrantee leaving me without a resolution. My neighbor then hired them for an inspection and they found no bed bugs. They did not offer to come back and find the true source of the issue either. They left me with no recourse with the neighbor. I paid them over a thousand dollars and did not resolve my bb problem.
Highly recommend EZ Bed Bug! Shopped around for price and prepping.  These guys had the best offer by far. Super professional and fast service. Thank you again guys.
"Knowledgeable team and great service. They handled our termite situation professionally and quickly."

I have had Thomas and his crew out for multiple tree removals and trimming service. Not only are they very competitively priced, they have done excellent work compared to other tree services that we have used in the past. I highly highly recommend them

Complaint.
Your workers parked on the curb that specifically called to not park on that side of the road, even though there was plenty of curb space on the other side. Please take measurements to avoid similar violations in the future.
Job location: Kentnor St, Metuchen, NJ 08840, around 11am on 12/07/23.

We were in need of a tree service for a small job, but too big for us to deal with on our own.  I called several companies. Most never called back and others were going to charge a ridiculous amount. Thomas not only gave a reasonable quote, he explained things about the tree that we never knew. Pleasant and knowledgeable! Thank you!

Thomas the owner is so thorough and listened to what I wanted. The job was done within minutes and I was very pleased! Great hardworking careful crew, amazing prices and efficient! So happy I chose Original Tree Service to take down the massive tree in my front yard!
Did a great job nice quick and clean
It was great Sebastian was amazing with my Peanut. She came out looking adorable. We will definitely go back 👍
Great services, my dogs smells perfect and, really enjoy the grooming service in this place!!
They did such a amazing job I highly recommend
Any was perfect
Shop local!! Great selection of pet food and accessories!

Poochie Doo does amazing work. They do my 2 English Cream Golden Retrievers. My boys get so excited to go for their spa day. Stacie and Brenda always do an awesome job on them. The bathers are great too. The prices are not crazy like other groomers. I definitely recommend Poochie Doo.

I’ve been taking my dog to Poochie Doo for over four years now and I absolutely love it. At one point, my dog also did training there, and it went amazing. The entire staff is super kind, professional, and truly cares about the dogs. They always do an incredible job, and I trust them completely. Highly recommend☺️10/10!

I wouldn’t say this is a complain more so constructive criticism. We’ve taken our dog here a couple times before and hadn’t had any issues but this time around was different. I’m not sure what happened while he was getting his hair cut but there is a significant amount missing right in the crook of his little leg, it seems as though in that one spot the shaved him w a number 1 or no guard at all. I’m very displeased with our service this time around as my dog is now uncomfortable and constantly wanting to itch at his leg. Please be more careful with someone else dog next time.

Avoid this grooming place by all means.  They  are rude, passive aggressive, uncooperative, extremely overpriced and have ridiculous rules. You are a bit late, they’ll charge you $15 extra. You want to reschedule, there is a $25 fee.  Their grooming is mediocre at best and they charge almost $100 for a small dog. And they overbook and make pets sit in cages forever waiting for their turn.

I’ve been bringing my dog there for 5 years now.
When I open the door to bring her in, she is so happy she loves going there and the work that the girls do over there is fantastic. My pet always looks good. Smells good her ears are so clean.
Her nails are done great the cut ( style) is so perfect. I highly recommend this grooming shop.
I give it five stars #. ⭐️ ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️🐩
Nice & clean, good pricing and good cuts.  They speak english and spanish.
The best around, always beyond exceptional service!!! Great haircuts!
Good haircuts but barbers are very slow. Several people waiting but the barbers ignore that and continue to cut with no sense of urgency.
I've been thwre 2ce and will come again. The guys here really know how to swing a pair of scissors. They have done an awesome job with me so far and I am glad to have found their shop
Arturo is the best.  Always precise and on point. I'm always satisfied with my haircuts. I've been going to him for about 8 years now.

Never have I even needed to get any alterations on clothing but over a month ago my north face puffer zipper broke . I decided to come here to try and have it fixed. But it was a disaster it took more than 3 weeks for them to actually change the zipper and when they did it wouldn’t even zip up properly. I had to come back 1 week later to see that My puffer has rips and tears from bad tailoring. My jacket came out worse than when I left it. Absolutely ridiculous and my jacket is ruined .
Quality tailoring
Rude old man
Wonderful, pleasant couple. They work hard and dry cleaning is always great. They also tailor too

I am extremely disappointed with my experience with Hudson Florist. I ordered the “In My Garden by BloomNation™” arrangement and paid an additional $25 for the Deluxe version. The photo displayed on their website shows a beautiful, full arrangement as the Standard option, so I expected the Deluxe arrangement to be even more impressive.

Instead, what was delivered looked nothing like the arrangement advertised. The flowers were sparse, lacked the variety shown online, and were clearly not representative of what I paid for. When I called the florist, the person who stated she made the arrangement offered only two explanations: that the Deluxe upgrade included orchids (there was not a single orchid in the arrangement) or that the delivery driver may have mixed up the orders.

What was most frustrating was the proposed solution. I was told they could pick up the flowers and issue a refund. The arrangement was sent as a gift and had already been delivered to the recipient for a special occasion. Removing the flowers from the recipient is not a reasonable solution. I never asked for a refund, I simply wanted the arrangement I paid for.

For the price charged, I expected honesty in advertising and much better customer service. Unfortunately, neither was provided.

Beautiful arrangements created for my brother’s funeral service. Perfect delivery, on time, punctual and thorough during this difficult time.

Thank you!

Worst florist..I ordered a bouquet for my daughter-in-laws Bday and the flowers were nothing like what I ordered online.  The colors that they chose were hideous!  I don’t recommend this florist and wish I could give them a “0” rating.  Do not use them, there are better florist in the area.

I have been in to the florist a couple of times and not only is the owner so sweet but the arrangements I have seen them make are gorgeous! The bouquet in the post below I think is an outstanding display of colors and textures and I’d be over the moon to receive that. I think it’s personal opinion and she should have requested specific colors if she knew what she wanted. That being said, I’m heading to Hudson Florist today to pick up some new plants!

Amazing experience all around! I ordered the morning of and got to pick it up a few hours later. The flowers were fresh and so pretty. Everything was handled with care. Would absolutely buy from this florist again!

I ordered online a beautiful bouquet of flowers, balloon, and a box of chocolates for our daughter-in-law’s Birthday. We live on the West Coast so I had to look for a nearby florist to her. I like that they are a family owned shop. She was so surprised! The flower arrangement was just as beautiful or even better than the online picture! It really made her day!  She enjoyed the tasty chocolates too!

Omg !!! This place is so amazing. They went above and beyond for Mother’s Day! I called them and worked with an employee by the name of Linda and she was so helpful and so wonderful! I told her I wanted something bold, brilliant, unique, and she totally delivered!!! I am so over the moon about this florist shop. Will definitely be doing all of my Mother’s Day arrangements moving forward with only this business!!!

I just had to take a moment to write this review because Brennan’s truly went above and beyond this time. For years, my mom, who lives down the shore, has been using Brennan’s to send me flowers for birthdays, celebrations, and other special occasions. Recently, I lost my beloved yorkie, Sophie, who had been by my side for 16 wonderful years. In the wake of that loss, my mom ordered a bouquet from Brennan’s, hoping to lift my spirits. The bouquet not only brightened my day but also served as a sweet reminder of Sophie, as it was delivered to celebrate her birthday. It was such a lovely gesture.

Today, I received the most beautiful arrangement of flowers I’ve ever seen. They are always wonderful, but this bouquet was truly breathtaking—such a bright and uplifting surprise. It completely lifted my spirits and brightened my day in ways I can’t put into words.

Thank you, Brennan’s, for always creating the most beautiful arrangements and for being so caring and thoughtful with my mom whenever she places an order. You have a special way of making a tough day a little bit easier, and I am truly grateful. You are simply the best!

Very friendly and helpful staff, reasonably priced, great flowers. I came here for anniversary flowers for my wife, and the florist arranged a bouquet for me on the spot after I described what I wanted. She made good choices for replacing flowers that were out of stock. Very satisfied, I would definitely come back again.

My friend always buys be flowers from here and everytime I’m beyond obsessed. I can never take my eyes off them. They’re so fresh every time and just get prettier by the day. And their delivery guy is so nice. Does his best to make sure the hand off is as seamless as possible. I need to start buying myself bouquets from here more often!

Nelson was responsive to both phone and texts, gave a fair estimate and was able to replace my hot water heater in an emergency within a 24-H turnaround time from the initial estimate. He was incredibly professional and really sweet during the whole process. Would work with him again!
Nelson is a perfectionist.. He does amazing work. I highly recommend him for any home project you have.
Bad job. I was change the new toilet but only good for a few months.now the toilet moved a lot.when I called them to come fixed the problem but they gone I can’t find they now.

I Had an issue and my main line was clogged. The previous plumber advised he needed to break the line through the floor.

These gentlemen were My second opinion they were clean and thorough. They unclogged the main stack. No floors had to be broken. They were reasonably priced. In fact they saved me money Because my floors did not have to be broken.

I ended up calling them back a few days later to install a toilet for me. They are clean and conscientious.

I couldn't ask for a better plumbing service company. Very impressed with their( Curtis and his assistant and  Valerie)  knowledge and work performance .Highly recommended. They will treat you fairly and with great results. I deal with different service companies thru the year and this one will be without a doub  on top of the list.A+ A+ A+ Service rended 9/16 2013 in Union NJ 07083.
Thanks Guys

I have used them twice (once for residential and once for commercial) and they get the job done. Fast, reliable and professional. It is a family run operation and they are great people. Highly recommended!!
I’d recommend this plumber to everyone.  Zachary did a great job helping us solving the problem of drain pipe backing up. He was competent, effective, courteous and fair- priced
The best
A wonderful place. Excellent customer service, very professional.

Business Name: Precise Mobile Notaries & Signing Service NJ
Review Text: My mom had passed away, and lived in Florida. I'm in SC and my older sister in NJ. Phyliss helped me complete real estate paperwork when we were about to miss a deadline. Extremely knowledgeable and professional.  My sister had questions, but Phylliss explained in detail. I cannot say enough, about her ability to get the job done.

Business Name: Precise Mobile Notaries & Signing Service NJ
Review Text: I had a great experience working with Phyliss for notary services. She was punctual, very professional, and walked me through everything with patience. The process was smooth from start to finish. Highly recommend her to anyone needing a reliable notary!

Business Name: Precise Mobile Notaries & Signing Service NJ
Review Text: Phyllis went above and beyond. Excellent service. Very friendly person if you need a notary, please contact her.

Business Name: Precise Mobile Notaries & Signing Service NJ
Review Text: Phyllis was my notary for a home mortgage refinance.  She came to my house and even had to stop at staples ahead of time to print forms because the lender had made a mistake!  She was extremely patient and took her time explaining and walking through the forms that required my signature.  She was very thorough and pleasant and I would highly recommend her services!

Business Name: Precise Mobile Notaries & Signing Service NJ
Review Text: Phyllis is an excellent notary. She came to my house to assist with my Home Equity Loan closing. She was extremely patient and explained everything. Overall a great experience! I would highly recommend her for any notary  services
Very happy with Aldo's work. He did a great job installing my garbage disposal and angle valves under my kitchen sink. Will definetely call him again.

Great experience with Aldo—honest, knowledgeable, and easy to work with. He clearly explained all our options without any pressure, which we really appreciated. Professional, friendly, and someone we’d definitely call again!

Woke up to the boiler room filling up due to this broken pipe. Called Aldo sent him a video of the issue and he came right over and explained the fixture he would have to do. He fixed it and pricing was great for a well done job i appreciate you coming same day and will definitely recommend

Aldo was very knowledgeable and
professional.!!He explained all of my options and I felt very comfortable that I was given all the information to make the decision on my repair. I also appreciate his patience and time. definitely best plumber in the area.!!AAA+
Aldo is an amazing guy, he came to my house late night and cleared out my main line. Diagnosed my issue and provided amazing feedback. Highly recommend him great service and amazing results

A great big shout out to Mark & his Bright Electric crew for a job well done. Called many others, he was the only one to reply back promptly.  Professional, & courteous men, cleaned up after the day of working, you would never have know they were at house. Got the  work completed just as he said they would. Great job &  great price. Definitely would recommend his service to anyone. Thank you, Mark. It was a pleasure.

We had a 100amp service upgrade and 4 outlets installed on our 2 family home by Bright Electrical and they did a great job. Mark is very accommodating and great to work with and prices were competitive. The job was finished quickly and very well. Mark scheduled and handled the inspection and all was well. I wouldn't use another electrician again. Highly recommended.

Mark and his team are the best in the business! I made the mistake of using another electrical tram in a pinch when Mark was busy with another project. I regret it! I wish I had just waited for Mark and his team to be available. There is no comparison! They are prompt, fast, and do extremely good work. I will be using them for as long as I'm in the Hudson County area.

Long story short, I called about 3 or 4 different companies and did not get a single call back. I stumbled across Bright Electric, called Mark, and he told me he could do the job the very next day. He even reached out and made it there 4 hours early. The existing wiring and mounting bracket were horrendous, but Mark and his guys got the job done with no issue and stuck to the agreed upon price. Couldn't be happier with the job they did.
Mark & his team did great job fixing couple of electrical issues at reasonable price.  He was here early the next morning after I called him and resolved the issues promptly! Excellent Service!

Business Name: U N I C O LANDSCAPING LLC
Review Text: Juan and his crew are true professionals. They removed one very large, diseased bush and did an excellent job trimming and sprucing up the rest of our yard. I will definitely be using Unico again and recommend to anyone looking for quality landscaping at a reasonable price.

Business Name: U N I C O LANDSCAPING LLC
Review Text: I’ve been using Unico for 4 years. Juan and his team are great. They always do things right and don’t cut any corners. Juan is friendly and easy to do business with.

Business Name: U N I C O LANDSCAPING LLC

Business Name: U N I C O LANDSCAPING LLC

Our daughter has been attending Alpha Minds for almost three years, and we couldn’t be happier with the experience. Everything there is wonderful — the teachers, the welcoming atmosphere, and the fun, engaging classes!
The owner, Anna, is always available, communicative, and truly cares about the students and families.
We would also like to especially praise our teacher, Ms. Svetlana. She is incredibly talented at teaching children and has a unique ability to help them learn and understand Russian in an easy and enjoyable way.
We are very happy with this after-school program, will continue attending, and highly recommend it to everyone!

Alpha Minds Academy is truly exceptional!
We have an outstanding experience with the school. The teachers are great and our children enjoyed studying there. The academic program is rigorous yet engaging and the small class sizes allow the teachers to have a personal touch with the children.
The school places a strong emphasis on critical thinking, creativity, and confidence building, and really shows! Our children performed in children shows, recited poems and other activities.
Communication with parents is excellent, and the staff is always responsive and supportive.
We couldn’t be happier with our decision to join Alpha Minds Academy. Highly recommended for any family looking for a well rounded, academically strong, and caring school experience!

We have had a great experience with Alphaminds. Alpahminds offers a wide range of classes with some great instructors. We particularly love Ms. Svetlana for Russian class, who has been teaching our son since 2019. She is wonderful, engaging, patient and kind. I would highly recommend to anyone looking for enrichment classes in Jersey City.

We've been attending AlphaMinds for two years and are extremely happy with the experience. The program is academically strong, setting a solid foundation for success, but what truly sets it apart is the caring and attentive teaching. The instructors nurture each child’s individual strengths and offer support through challenging moments. We will definitely continue with AlphaMinds and highly recommend it to anyone looking to enhance their child's academic skills in a fun, engaging, and pressure-free environment.

We live in San Francisco. My daughter has been taking on line Math and English classes with AlphaMinds for over 4 years. The school Director Anna is very professional and extremely helpful when choosing the right class  matched with a knowledgeable, personable, and engaging teacher.

With so many options offered online we found AlphaMinds  the best match for us. This year my daughter was excepted to a high school of her choice with Advanced Honors . We are highly appreciative to Anna and her great team of  teachers for what they do.  We absolutely loved our experience with AlphaMinds!

I had to do my taxes last minute and Meriam took me right away. When I got there she was pleasant and patient with me even after I was unprepared and frantically gathering necessary documents together. She made the process simple and straightforward and when I paid her in cash she even tried to reduce my fee. I had a wonderful experience with this brokerage and and will return next year. I highly recommend!!

THANK YOU!
West side brokerage has been handling my taxes for 3 years, and I must say that Meriem is highly efficient. She respond quickly and works extremely well,for which I am very grateful!

I filed my tax for the first time here. Extremely happy that I came here. First of all, she answers phone calls when the phone rings. Very important! Second, the level of expertise and the amount of knowledges on tax filing. She knows what she is doing and very helpful and professional with everyone. Very pleasant and respectful too. Thank you so much for your time today Meriem, See you in May!
Thank you for  being always responsive and helping me every year with my taxes. You always do everything perfectly.

A friend of mine recommended Meriem for taxes, and I've been working with her for several years now. West Side Brokerage provides exceptional services, and the expertise, timely communication, and personalized approach made the process just smooth and stress-free. It's really the best place for doing taxes, I'm thankful and highly recommend her services to anyone! All the best and looking forward to collaborate with you next year!

Business Name: Madden Nicole Dry Cleaners and Professional Tailoring
Review Text:
I cannot say enough amazing things! I was a last-minute bridesmaid and needed an emergency alteration (a dress that was a size 16 taken down to about a size 4). I honestly didn’t think it was even possible. It was a massive transformation, and they not only made it work, they made it look like it was custom-made for me from the start.

The fit was flawless, the craftsmanship was incredible, and the dress looked stunning. You would never guess how much work went into it. They were professional, kind, reassuring, and somehow pulled off a miracle under time pressure.

If you need someone who is detailed, talented, and truly cares about their work, this is the place to go. I’m beyond grateful!

Business Name: Madden Nicole Dry Cleaners and Professional Tailoring
Review Text: Terrible service!! I am appalled at the fact that i consulted before placing my order whether this business does dry cleaning for large fluffy blankets. I was told yes only then did i decide to proceed with the service. The price was a reaping $55 but i did not argue i just wanted my blanket cleaned. I showed the lady my blanket she approved and i dropped it off she told me i can pick it up the following week. Once i picked it up i brought it home but didnt open it until last night and lo-behold it was dirty and WET! My blanket looked exactly how I dropped it off dirty with stains. It did not smell any different (cleaner) in anyway. This is disgusting considering i feel scammed for my money. As if i dropped my blanket off and it was never touched until i picked it up again. Ridiculous! Do better!

Business Name: Madden Nicole Dry Cleaners and Professional Tailoring
Review Text: I've been going to Madden Nicole regularly for over 4 years. They might be slightly more expensive than others, but the quality of cleaning is far more superior and worth it. The service has always been timely, and Nicole is always wonderful and cheerful!

Business Name: Madden Nicole Dry Cleaners and Professional Tailoring
Review Text: This place is by far the best dry cleaner!! my husband found them and we been using them from that day on they never messed up any of our clothing like others had done in the past.when we pick up our stuff it’s always pressed very good they even cleaned my Gucci hat and it came back looking brand new I highly recommend them they are very professional.

Business Name: Madden Nicole Dry Cleaners and Professional Tailoring
Review Text: Thank you so much for the alterations on my daughter’s quinceañera dress! This was an extremely last minute job and it was perfect!!

We called Burlew Mechanical emergently after discovering a major leak. They were here within 20 minutes and had the pipe replaced immediately (even though it's a Friday evening). Dominic was polite, efficient, and even played games with my toddler while he worked. We will definitely recommend them to anyone that needs plumbing work, and will use them again in the future.

We would highly recommend Burlew Mechanical.  The whole team was amazing, they worked fast and had our sewer line fixed the same day considering we have a very challenging yard with not a lot of space to maneuver large equipment. They were very clean and neat back filling our yard. And patient with our boys who were under foot wanting to watch the machines and play in the dirt! They offer many services and we will be sure to use them again.

Burlew is a company you can trust in an emergency. No one more professional and knowledgable. No one better equipped to handle every possible mechanical problem.
Jens Efsen PE Efsen Engineering.
Dominic and company did a tremendous job replacing my furnace. I recommend Burlew Mechanical for any plumbing need.
Good overall experience.  I am a repeat customer, and I will use this company for future repairs.
Went here as a recommendation by my coworker. I didn’t walk out with what I originally went for but still found a piece I figured my boyfriend would love as a Father’s Day gift. Price was decent.

We visited the shop today and purchased a Miami Cuban link bracelet for my wife’s birthday.  My wife absolutely loves it. This place is family owned and operated which I not only support, but appreciate.  Leudy was very attentive, gave us a great price, and a complimentary clean on a separate piece of jewelry that we didn’t purchase from them.  With that being said, I highly recommend and would visit them again in the future.

Luedy and his Wife were really nice.  I bought a Miami Cuban link from them.  It was positive energy and a great atmosphere there.  The bracelet is beautiful and is a good weight for the price.  Highly recommend!
Awesome spot to shop at lady. Seems nice. They have finance clients, and I recommend shop in here.
Very good service and nice selection of jewelry. 100% recommend

I'm still buzzing with excitement after Felix worked his magic on my GT-R. He turned it into a performance BEAST that surpassed all expectations. The power, precision, and personal touch he brought to the tuning process were simply remarkable and amazing If you're seeking unforgettable thrills, look no further than Felix Medina Racing!

Felix Medina is one of the best Tuners in a very competitive field. He has built some of the fastest Import and European cars in the world. There are 2 in house Dyno machines and he also does remote tuning. I’ve been doing business with him since the early 2000’s and would never take my GTR that he has built to be tuned no where else. Great guy.
I wouldn't take my GTR anywhere else.... Felix made the car my passion again.

So far, NOT A pleasant experience. I called to get a little bit of information about a vehicle they had tuned and they hung up on me as soon as I said what I was calling about. Are we not allowed to inquire in this day and age?

One of the dryers wasn't working properly. It wasn't spining correctly so I went to inform an employee that hey I paid for this dryer and it is working significantly worse then the others and wont spin. I took out all my pants and jackets and it still wasn't rolling. The employee proceeded to blame it all on me. I put the heavier clothing in a different dryer to show that hey this dryer I paid for isn't working. She continued to yell at me and belittle me, acting as if it was all my fault and ignored that there dryer wasn't working. It took me a solid like 10 mins to explain that I didn't want to pay for another dryer just because there other one wasn't working. She eventually said fine and would only give me 75 cents for a different dryer even though I paid 1.50. Wouldn't you know it the other dryer worked perfectly and I was right that the other one just wasn't operating correctly. They have a massive sign hanging up that says "welcome, you deserve the best" so it seems there best is to yell at you and blaim you for there machines not working. She kept saying it was too heavy when I have been using these dryers from months now with the same amount of clothing. It wasn't to heavy it just dryer 62 isn't working. She just told me next time don't use dryer 62. Or here is a better idea, fix the dryer or put up an out of service sign instead of scamming people and telling them its their fault. I will be going to a different laundromat instead of using dryer 62. I would suggest trying some of the other places near by. It may be a further walk but you will get much better service and working dryers. All this place needs to do to be good is be kinder to there customers and take care of there machines.

I will not be returning. I brought in a dress with a few very minor stains, and it was returned looking the same. When I brought the dress in they told me they could remove the stains and charged me full price. When I returned and the stains weren’t removed, I was only offered store credit because they already charged me. Store credit is useless since after this encounter I will not be returning. They offered a second cleaning but warned they would not be liable if they damaged the dress. This left me with no real solution. I expected honesty about the likelihood of stain removal and am very disappointed with both the results and customer service.

I brought my custom suit here for dry cleaning, and the experience was extremely disappointing. The suit wasn’t delivered back when expected, and I only found out there was an issue after I called to ask. They told me it had to be sent back to dry cleaning but never informed me beforehand.

Later that week, I called again and was told it had been delivered. When I checked the lobby, it wasn’t there. After several calls back and forth, they insisted it had been delivered, but couldn’t provide proof. In the end, they simply apologized without offering to compensate me for the loss of my suit.

Based on how the situation was handled, I can only assume they lost or damaged my suit the first time around and had no plan to return it and simply lie about it being delivered.

My building had never had any issues with people taking suits that don’t belong to them.

Now I’m left replacing a custom suit out of my own pocket. I cannot recommend this business.

It is unfortunate that these ratings do not provide a negative 0 because it is the best way to describe this business. Please take your money else where, if you are looking for quality work. I ordered 2 necklace name plates. I picked out a different chain, then the one they provide because I wanted better quality and paid my order in full! They promised my order would be ready right before Christmas, on the 21st.
I called the night before to ensure it would be ready for pick up. I must have spent 20 minutes on the phone with them putting me on hold, asking for my name over and over. It was evident my order was not completed and they didn't even have a copy of my receipt in file. The lady went as far as asking to please text her the receipt I had to see if she could find it. Finally, she said she had located the receipt and it would be ready by tomorrow. I could tell she was not confident about what she was saying. But I was still optimistic and showed up the next day.
Once there, the run around began once more. People whispering, speaking into other associates ears and moving around trying to buy time. It was the most sneaky, uncomfortable, unprofessional experience I had ever experienced. After 30 mins of wait, an employee walks in the door with something in his hand and quickly shoves it into one of the girls hands standing behind the counter. She without even inspecting it, opens it and quickly tries to put it in a gift box while saying it's ready Ms. I asked her to please let me see it. The name plates were gold, were very oxidated, as if they were fake, instead of the white gold I paid for and the chains were the manufacturer ones they provide, instead of the one I picked. He mentioned the one he used was better quality and he took it upon himself to use that chain. Not what I had picked.  I was infuriated and so disappointed as it was a Xmas gift and it was now the 21st. I asked for my money back but again they kept going in circles promising they would fix it. He stated he would have it done the next day. When I returned the next day, they still were not done. The owner literally called the shop where it was being made as they were preparing it and asked me to approve the work via video and give him one more day.
In conclusion when I finally received my order the chains were 2 in longer than what I asked for and the plates, well you be the judge. I have no idea how this place is still in business. They are not professional, punctual, trust worthy, sympathetic, honest or provide good service. If you want something done right, please go elsewhere. It seems this place runs based on greed.

These are genuinely good people who truly care about their customers. I highly recommend this store to everyone!

the 27th only to find out once again they were NOT done. Finally got my vest back with patches in the wrong location and poorly stitched. Please stay away!!!!!!

Our 6-year-old son has been attending Satori Academy in Parlin, and we’ve had a truly great experience so far. The instructors are incredibly patient, encouraging, and know exactly how to work with young children in a positive and motivating way.

We’ve seen noticeable improvement in his confidence, focus, discipline, and listening skills since joining. The classes are structured, energetic, and fun, which keeps him excited and engaged every week.

What we appreciate most is that the academy focuses not only on martial arts techniques but also on building respect, self-control, and positive habits in children. The staff is welcoming, professional, and genuinely cares about every student’s progress.

Highly recommend Satori Academy to parents looking for a supportive and well-organized martial arts program for young kids.

Satori Parlin is a great place for MMA. The Senseis make kids feel comfortable and encouraged to do their best. The classes are extra fun but not a game at all. This is a space for growth, development and focus. So many good things have come to my family thanks to Satori.

Where do I start? I have been away from martial arts for many years. I decided to come back and  gave Satori in Old Bridge a try. Infact, I also took my 11 year old daughter to a trial class as well. We were hooked from day one! The culture of the academy is excellent. The Instructors are fantastic. They push you to be your best. We have now attended for about three months. Each class makes you feel like you are getting closer and closer to your goals (self defense skills, better health, and of course, Black belt) and is structured to measure your success. They also host events like board breaking, nunchuck seminars, movie nights, Zombie walks on Halloween and much more!!!! Classes are a available 5 days out the week, and the instructor recommended at least coming twice a week for best learning. Highly recommended.

We’ve had a wonderful experience with Satori Academy.  The senseis (Sensei Mindy and Sensei Abel) and coaches create a positive and structured environment that really helps young children develop discipline and confidence. My 4-year-old son has shown great progress since joining—both in his focus and his ability to follow instructions.

The senseis (Sensei Mindy and Sensei Abel) and coaches are patient, encouraging, and clearly care about each child’s development. Classes are well organized and keep the kids engaged while teaching important values like respect, self-control, and perseverance.

One of the things I appreciate the most is how they encourage each child individually and celebrate their progress. My son is always excited to come to class, and it’s wonderful to see how proud he feels when he learns something new or improves a skill and earns a stripe/belt.

It’s amazing to see how much he’s learned in a short time. We’re very happy with the progress he’s making and highly recommend Satori Academy to other parents looking for a supportive place for their children to grow and learn.

Satori academy is a great place for your kids to develop their skills and gain confidence. Sensi Mindy and all other instructors are great at what they do and have a lot of patients. They take the time to help everyone when needed. Great place and great classes!!

Chris and his team were amazing. They were on time every day, did 4 rooms in my house (including ceilings, doors and trim) within a week and did a phenomenal job. They're a super talented team and great guys to work with. I would recommend them to everyone.
